title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Square Yards - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Square Yards - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
